data.title: Franklin Templeton Joins Growing Pile of Solana ETF Applicants
data.description:
Asset manager Franklin Templeton is seeking SEC approval for funds based on the performance of Solana, the sixth-largest coin by market cap.
source: https://decrypt.co/307334/franklin-templeton-spot-solana-etf

data.title: How the largest crypto exchange hack happened: What Ethereum security experts say about Lazarus’ $1.5 billion Bybit attack
data.description:
Ethereum security researchers hackers deployed malware and then forced the multisig holders to "blind sign" a malicious transaction.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/342791/largest-crypto-exchange-hack-what-ethereum-security-experts-know-lazarus-bybit?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Dogecoin (DOGE) Active Addresses Jump 34% Amid Adoption Shift
data.description:
Dogecoin (DOGE) onchain activity steadily increases, with active addresses jumping 34% on the monthly chart. This jump suggests rising Dogecoin adoption as the memecoin shows signs of recovery. Although major cryptocurrencies are in the green, DOGE is still down below key support levels. However, analysts anticipate the token will increase by twice its current price […]
The post Dogecoin...
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/02/21/dogecoin-doge-active-addresses-jump-34-amid-adoption-shift/

data.title: U.S. Digital Assets Sub-Committee to Hold Hearing on Bipartisan Crypto Legislation
data.description:
The U.S. Senate Banking Committee is set to revisit U.S. Crypto regulations in a February 26 hearing. Lawmakers and industry experts, including representatives from Kraken and Lightspark, will debate stablecoins, market structure, and a proposed Bitcoin reserve to shape future digital asset policies.
The post U.S. Digital Assets Sub-Committee to Hold Hearing on Bipartisan Crypto Legislation...
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/us-senate-panel-crypto-regulation-hearing/

data.title: Robinhood stock plunges 14% in worst week since August as crypto surge fades
data.description:
Shares of financial services company Robinhood fell 14% in their worst week since August as investors withdrew from the surge that followed President Trump's election.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/robinhood-stock-plunges-14-in-worst-week/

data.title: Bybit reports $1.5B hack to the authorities, working to block stolen ETH sales
data.description:
Bybit has officially reported the $1.5 billion hack to authorities, launching an aggressive effort to track and block the 401,000 ETH stolen from its cold wallet. The exchange confirmed that law enforcement is involved, and forensic teams are working to demix hacker addresses to limit how the funds can be sold. Bybit announced the development […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bybit-reports-1-5b-hack-to-the-authorities-working-to-block-stolen-eth-sales/

data.title: Three Altcoins Skyrocket in Hours After Going Live on Top US Crypto Exchange Coinbase
data.description:
A decentralized oracle provider and two artificial intelligence (AI)-focused altcoins surged just hours after going live on top US-based crypto exchange platform Coinbase. The data reveals that Chainlink (LINK) rival Pyth Network (PYTH) and AI-based projects Kaito (KAITO) and Bittensor (TAO) all saw significant increases in price after gaining support from Coinbase. KAITO – an […]
The post...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/02/21/three-altcoins-skyrocket-in-hours-after-going-live-on-top-us-crypto-exchange-coinbase/

data.title: India’s SuperGaming Launching B3 Gamechain via Ethereum’s Base Network
data.description:
The B3 gaming network on Ethereum layer-2 Base will host a dedicated chain built by Indian game publisher SuperGaming.
source: https://decrypt.co/307325/india-supergaming-b3-gamechain-ethereum-base

data.title: SEC's Coinbase Reversal Is Only the Latest Pro-Crypto Shift Under Trump
data.description:
The SEC is abandoning cases and shaping new rules for the industry, reflecting the Trump administration’s more crypto-friendly approach.
source: https://decrypt.co/307306/sec-coinbase-reversal-latest-pro-crypto-shift-trump
